model.label: MiMo-V2-Flash
model.description: MiMo • Flash-tier model configured through a custom endpoint for fast inference and lightweight agent tasks.

pick.rationale: Arizona enters as a dominant 1-seed with elite efficiency metrics, ranking 3rd in both KenPom and Torvik, while Villanova ranks 33rd-36th, creating a significant talent gap. The Wildcats' top-10 adjusted offense and defense should overwhelm Villanova's balanced but less potent attack, and there are no reported injury concerns for either side. Villanova's path relies on disciplined play and perimeter shooting, but Arizona's superior efficiency, depth, and recent form—including a 31-2 record and wins over top teams—make them the reliable pick to advance.

reasoningStep.title: Team Quality and Efficiency Analysis
reasoningStep.summary: Arizona holds a decisive advantage in advanced metrics, ranking 3rd nationally in both KenPom and Torvik, compared to Villanova's 33rd-36th range, indicating a substantial talent and efficiency gap.
reasoningStep.vidence: Arizona: KenPom rank 3, adj_em 37.56, adj_o 127.2 (7th), adj_d 89.7; Torvik rank 3, adjoe 126.2 (10th), adjde 91.1 (3rd). Villanova: KenPom rank 33, adj_em 19.94, adj_o 120.4 (42nd), adj_d 100.4; Torvik rank 36, adjoe 119.6 (44th), adjde 100.5 (37th).

toolCalls.summary: Returned combined Torvik/KenPom ratings for 2 teams.

result.text: Arizona Wildcats Scores, Stats and Highlights - ESPN Skip to main content Skip to navigation ESPN NFL NFL NBA NBA NCAAM NCAAM NCAAW NCAAW MLB MLB NHL NHL Soccer Soccer More Sports More Sports Watch Watch Fantasy Fantasy Where to Watch Search 2 Arizona Wildcats 32-2 1st in Big 12 Home Schedule Statistics Roster Tickets External Link Men's Tournament Challenge NEW: TC Eliminator 2025-26 Schedule Postseason vs 16 Long Island 3/20 1:35 pm TNT Regular Season vs 3 Florida W 93-87 vs Utah Tech W 93-67 vs N Arizona W 84-49 vs 15 UCLA W 69-65 @ 3 UConn W 71-67 vs Denver W 103-73 vs Norfolk St W 98-61 vs 20 Auburn W 97-68 vs 12 Alabama W 96-75 vs Abilene Chrstn W 96-62 vs San Diego St W 68-45 vs Bethune W 107-71 vs S Dakota St W 99-71 @ Utah W 97-78 vs Kansas St W 101-76 @ TCU W 86-73 vs Arizona St W 89-82 @ UCF W 84-77 vs Cincinnati W 77-51 vs West Virginia W 88-53 @ 13 BYU W 86-83 @ Arizona St W 87-74 vs Oklahoma St W 84-47 @ 9 Kansas L 82-78 vs 16 Texas Tech L 78-75 vs 23 BYU W 75-68 @ 2 Houston W 73-66 @ Baylor W 87-80 vs 14 Kansas W 84-61 vs 6 Iowa State W 73-57 @ Colorado W 89-79 vs UCF W 81-59 vs 7 Iowa State W 82-80 vs 5 Houston W 79-74 Full Schedule Wildcats NCAAM Joe Lunardi's ultimate guide to men's March Madness 2026 21h Joe Lunardi Illustration by ESPN Men's tournament odds: Duke ahead of Michigan, Arizona to win tournament 21h Doug Greenberg Lance King/Getty Images SVPod: Scott Van Pelt and Stanford Steve are here to react to the 2026 NCAA Tournament March Madness bracket. Scott Van Pelt and Stanford Steve are here to react to the 2026 NCAA Tournament March Madness bracket. Steve gives his UNFILTERED thoughts on all the issues with the bracket. Duke's draw is TOUGH, and Steve is giving his Blue Devils NO CHANCE of reaching Indy. A potential Florida-Vandy rematch isn't ideal, and a road game in the Elite 8?? Plus, will chalk indeed fly? Is it Arizona's year? Which upsets does SVP like the most? Plus, a solution to the flopping problem, reaction to Bam Adebayo's 83-point game and an in-depth breakdown of Cam Young's Players Championship victory. Finally, thoughts on the nasty front taking over the east coast, Steve needs tickets to the Women's Final Four, an all-time SVP golf tactic and Steve's admission to grand theft auto. | SVPod Appoximate Time Codes/Topics (0:00) Intro (0:34) Bracket reaction (5:12) Should Miami (OH) have to play in Dayton? (7:37) Conference championship reactions (9:17) Steve’s issues with the bracket (10:42) Should Purdue be a 2-seed? All-time winners list 3d ESPN Rich Graessle/Icon Sportswire Demon Deacons NCAAM Clemson defeats Wake Forest 71-62 to reach quarterfinals of ACC Tournament — RJ Godfrey had 11 points and eight rebounds and Clemson rode a red-hot first half to a 71-62 victory over Wake Forest on Wednesday night to reach the quarterfinals of the ACC Tournament. 6d Demon Deacons NCAAM Wake Forest Demon Deacons vs. Clemson Tigers: Game Highlights 6d Demon Deacons NCAAM Colvin's 18 points leads Wake Forest scoring wave to 95-89 OT win over Virginia Tech in ACC opener — Myles Colvin scored 18 points and led seven Wake Forest teammates in double-figures scoring and the Demon Deacons went to overtime to beat Virginia Tech 95-89 Tuesday night in a first-round ACC Tournament contest. 7d Demon Deacons NCAAM Wake Forest Demon Deacons vs. Virginia Tech Hokies: Game Highlights 7d Demon Deacons NCAAM Harris scores 31 to lead Wake Forest to 80-73 comeback win over Cal — Juke Harris tallied 31 points and grabbed 15 rebounds as Wake Forest came back from a double-digit deficit to defeat Cal 80-73 on Saturday to close out the Atlantic Coast Conference regular season. 10d Demon Deacons NCAAM California Golden Bears vs. Wake Forest Demon Deacons: Game Highlights 10d Demon Deacons NCAAM No. 13 Virginia wraps up No. 2 seed in ACC with 75-70 win over Wake Forest — Thijs De Ridder scored 16 points and No. 13 Virginia outlasted Wake Forest 75-70 on Tuesday night to secure the No. 2 seed and a double-bye in the Atlantic Coast Conference Tournament. 14d Demon Deacons NCAAM Wake Forest Demon Deacons vs. Virginia Cavaliers: Game Highlights

modelTrace.content:
You are an analyst predicting a single March Madness game inside a bracket run.
You have live tools. Use them before making a pick when they can reduce uncertainty.
You are not filling the whole bracket in one response. Predict only the current game.
Use prior picks as already committed bracket state.
You may use at most 10 tool rounds before you must finalize your answer.
Before making a pick, investigate relevant context such as injuries or availability concerns, recent team news, prior head-to-head results when useful, and multiple raw statistics from the available ratings and matchup data.
Take a holistic approach. Balance team quality, matchup specifics, health, form, schedule context, and upset risk instead of relying on one metric.
Do not force an upset, but explicitly consider whether the underdog has a credible path to win and let that affect confidence and rationale.
Return strict JSON only.
Final JSON keys: pick, reasoningStep.
pick must contain gameId, winnerId, confidence, rationale.
The rationale must be a short paragraph of 2 to 4 sentences explaining why the winner was chosen.
reasoningStep must contain id, title, summary, evidence.
Bracket config id: 2026-bracket
Tournament year: 2026
Current game id: r32-west-1
Current game label: West Round of 32 1
Round: Round of 32
Resolved teams: Arizona (arizona) vs Villanova (villanova)
Prior committed picks: 40
